Submit New Project

Complete all steps to earn your ECC tokens. Our system complies with ISO 14064-2 & 14064-3 standards.

STEP 1: Project Information

Individual: <50 kW solar, <5 hectares trees, single EV/unit
Large: ≥50 kW solar, ≥5 hectares trees, fleet/commercial

ECC Token Calculation

Project Useful Life: - years
Total CO₂ Offset (Lifetime): - tCO₂
Annual CO₂ Offset: - tCO₂/year
ECC Payment Schedule (5 Years Only):
Year 1 (Upon Approval): - ECC
Years 2-5: Requires annual verification update
Total 5-Year ECC: - ECC
⚠️ Only 5 years of ECC tokens will be issued for this project. After Year 5, no additional ECC for this project.

STEP 2: Proof of Installation

Must show: Date, Amount, Equipment specifications

From certified installer or government authority

STEP 3: Photographic Evidence

All photos must include GPS coordinates & timestamp (automatically captured by most smartphones)

Shows complete system + building

Shows equipment serial number clearly

Shows kW rating, manufacturer

Shows working system with live data

STEP 4: Ownership & Rights

Property document OR rental agreement

STEP 5: Legal Terms & Carbon Credit Rights Agreement

Terms & Conditions

By submitting this project for verification, you acknowledge and agree to the following terms:

1. DATA INTEGRITY & ACCURACY:

  • All information, documents, and photos provided are true, accurate, and complete
  • You will NOT alter, modify, or change any submitted data without prior written permission from EcoCoin
  • Any material changes to the project must be reported immediately to EcoCoin
  • False or misleading information may result in immediate disqualification and legal action

2. CARBON CREDIT RIGHTS ASSIGNMENT:

  • By claiming ECC tokens, you grant EcoCoin the exclusive right to claim, register, and monetize carbon credits derived from your project data
  • You agree that EcoCoin may aggregate your project with other similar projects for carbon registry submissions (Gold Standard, Verra VCS, CDM)
  • You retain your individual ECC tokens as personal compensation
  • EcoCoin retains the right to sell, trade, or retire carbon credits on international carbon markets
  • This assignment is valid for the duration of the ECC payment period (5 years)

3. EXCLUSIVITY & NON-REUSE:

  • You confirm this project is NOT and will NOT be registered with any other carbon credit program, registry, or platform
  • You will NOT claim, sell, or trade carbon credits from this project through any other mechanism
  • You will NOT submit this project to multiple carbon credit platforms simultaneously or in the future
  • Double-counting or double-claiming of carbon credits is strictly prohibited and may result in legal consequences

4. ECC TOKEN PAYMENT STRUCTURE:

  • Year 1: First allocation of ECC tokens upon project approval
  • Years 2-5: Annual ECC payments contingent on submission of annual verification updates (photos, operational status)
  • After Year 5: No additional ECC tokens will be issued for this project, regardless of project continuation
  • Failure to submit annual updates may result in suspension of future ECC payments

5. MONITORING & VERIFICATION:

  • You agree to cooperate with EcoCoin's monitoring and verification processes
  • EcoCoin reserves the right to conduct on-site inspections or request additional documentation
  • You will submit annual updates (photos, operational status) by the anniversary date of project approval
  • Projects found to be non-operational or misrepresented may have ECC tokens revoked

6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY:

  • You retain ownership of your physical project and equipment
  • EcoCoin may use project data, photos, and information for marketing, reporting, and registry purposes
  • You grant EcoCoin a perpetual, royalty-free license to use project documentation

7. LIABILITY & INDEMNIFICATION:

  • You indemnify EcoCoin against any claims arising from false information or misrepresentation
  • EcoCoin is not responsible for project operation, maintenance, or performance
  • ECC token values may fluctuate; no guaranteed monetary value is implied

8. TERMINATION:

  • EcoCoin may terminate this agreement if you breach any terms
  • You may request project removal, but must forfeit all unclaimed ECC tokens
  • Carbon credit rights assigned to EcoCoin remain valid even after termination

⚠️ IMPORTANT: By checking the boxes below and submitting your project, you are entering into a legally binding agreement. Please read carefully and consult legal counsel if needed.

Required Acknowledgments

✅ Fair Exchange: You receive ECC tokens as immediate compensation. EcoCoin uses your project data to generate carbon credits for international markets. This creates a win-win: you get immediate value, we enable global carbon finance.

Processing Time: Most submissions are verified within 2-5 days. You'll receive an email notification once your project is approved and tokens are allocated.

KYC & Identity Verification

Complete identity verification to unlock higher trading limits, staking rewards, and premium features. All data is encrypted and compliant with GDPR, AML/CFT regulations.

KYC Verification Tiers

Basic KYC
Not Started
Requirements:
  • Email verification
  • Phone number (SMS)
  • Basic personal info
Limits: $1,000/day trading
Advanced KYC
Locked
Requirements:
  • Government-issued ID
  • Selfie with liveness check
  • Address proof document
  • AML screening pass
Limits: $50,000/day trading
Pro KYC
Locked
Requirements:
  • Advanced KYC completed
  • Accredited investor proof
  • Enhanced due diligence
  • Video interview
Limits: Unlimited trading

📸 Biometric Verification

🔒 Anti-Spoofing Technology Enabled

Our AI-powered liveness detection prevents photo/video spoofing. You'll be asked to perform random facial movements.

✅ Liveness Checks:
  • Blink detection
  • Head rotation (left/right)
  • Smile detection
  • 3D depth mapping
⚠️ Requirements:
  • Good lighting
  • Face clearly visible
  • No sunglasses/masks
  • Camera permission required
👆
Enhanced Security: Fingerprint Verification

Optional but recommended for Pro KYC tier

🛡️ AML/CFT Compliance Screening

🔍 Automated Compliance Checks

Your information will be screened against international sanctions lists and PEP (Politically Exposed Person) databases. This is required by law.

Personal Information (Required for Screening)

🏠 Address Proof Verification

📍 Accepted Address Proof Documents:
  • Utility Bills: Electricity, Gas, Water (issued within last 3 months)
  • Bank Statements: Physical or digital statement (last 3 months)
  • Government Documents: Tax assessment, voter registration
  • Rental Agreement: Signed lease or rental contract

  • Reduced trading fees (0.1% vs 0.5%)

🏗️ Project Aggregation Manager

📍 Filter & Search Projects

📊 Search Results

Use the filters above and click "Search Projects" to find aggregatable projects

📋 Aggregation Standards

Geographic Limits:
  • District Level: Same district (e.g., Charsadda)
  • City Level: Same city (e.g., Peshawar)
  • Radius: Within 50 km radius
Minimum Size:
  • Solar PV: 100 kW total (20+ homes)
  • Trees: 10 hectares (5,000+ trees)
  • EVs: 50+ vehicles
Standards:
  • ✅ ISO 14064-2 (GHG Project Quantification)
  • ✅ ISO 14064-3 (Verification Requirements)
  • ✅ Gold Standard Methodology
  • ✅ Verra VCS Standards

📋

How Community Projects Are Created

When multiple users submit verification data from the same location and project type, EcoCoin automatically aggregates this data into a Community Carbon Project. This unique approach enables individuals to participate in carbon markets that were previously accessible only to large corporations.

📊

Data Collection

🔄

Aggregation

✅

Verification

🏛️

Registry

🌱

No Projects Yet

Start contributing data through the Calculator tab to help create community carbon projects.

⚡

Understanding Additionality

Additionality is the cornerstone of carbon credit integrity. It means the emission reductions would not have occurred without the carbon credit incentive. Our projects demonstrate additionality by:

  • Barrier Analysis: Proving financial, technological, or institutional barriers
  • Common Practice Test: Showing the activity isn't standard practice in the region
  • Investment Analysis: Demonstrating carbon revenue enables the project
  • Legal Requirement Test: Confirming no regulatory mandate exists

🏢 For Carbon Credit Buyers

Our community-aggregated projects offer a unique value proposition: genuine grassroots impact combined with rigorous verification. Each credit represents verified contributions from real individuals.

How Community Pooling Works

⚡ Automatic Pooling Enabled

Small projects (<100 tCO2e) are automatically pooled based on your location and project type. Our geo-detection system identifies your division and matches you with similar nearby projects.

1

Submit Your Project

Enter coordinates for geo-detection

2

Auto-Pool Assignment

Matched by region & activity type

3

Auto-Verification

Triggered at 100 tCO2e threshold

4

Auto-Distribution

ECC tokens sent to your wallet

💡 Fully Automated: No manual action needed! 2% pooling fee applies, verified pools receive 5% bonus.

✅ How to Earn Points

  • Complete 5 quizzes daily for consistent points
  • Finish the Daily Challenge for 2x bonus
  • Watch climate videos to learn & earn
  • Share on social media for higher points
  • Complete courses to unlock certificates
  • Maintain 70% attendance for eligibility
  • Refer friends to earn 200 bonus points
  • Take the Eco Pledge to commit & earn

❌ What to Avoid

  • Don't skip daily check-ins (affects attendance)
  • Don't rush through quizzes - accuracy matters
  • Don't exceed daily activity limits (won't count)
  • Don't share answers - cheating is monitored
  • Don't create multiple accounts
  • Don't skip prerequisites before advanced courses
  • Don't ignore course deadlines
  • Don't miss certificate claim deadlines

💡 Pro Tip: Points convert to ECC tokens monthly. Higher points = more ECC rewards!
